response.justification: The candidate lacks direct experience in SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator hardware optimization, or deep-learning workload analysis — core requirements for the Principal Performance Architect role. Their background is predominantly in full-stack web and mobile development, with minimal evidence of hardware-software co-design, SIMD/MIMD architectures, or GPU/accelerator performance tuning, despite some low-level DLang and C/C++ exposure.
strengths: Strong full-stack engineering experience across diverse tech stacks
Demonstrated open-source contributions and tooling development
Proven ability to work on performance-critical systems (e.g., low-latency DLang apps)
concerns: No evidence of SoC, IP, or AI accelerator modeling experience
Lacks deep expertise in deep-learning workload optimization or GPU architecture
Education is a BS in CS — insufficient without 8+ years of relevant hardware-focused experience
